learnings.summary: When a GSD executor subagent is dispatched with a worktree path (e.g., `.claude/
learnings.explanation: Events 1-9 show the agent repeatedly failing to read files from a worktree path that didn't exist, then recovering by checking the main project directory. This is a recurring risk when GSD executor agents are dispatched with worktree paths that may have been cleaned up.

learnings.summary: Web tests run via `npx vitest run <path> --reporter=verbose` in the `web/` direc
learnings.explanation: Events 33 and 44-45 show the test commands that work in this project — useful for future sessions to know the exact invocation pattern.

learnings.summary: When adding new TypeScript interfaces to `web/lib/api.ts`, place `*Response` int
learnings.explanation: Events 26-27 show the pattern of placing new interfaces before the interfaces that reference them in api.ts — this ordering convention prevents forward-reference issues and matches the existing codebase pattern.
